channel.title: United States on Bali Kini
channel.description: Recent content in United States on Bali Kini

item.title: US Companies Deepen Investment in Bali: Marriott to PepsiCo
item.description: Several major US corporations have officially reaffirmed their commitment to expand and deepen their investments in Bali. The announcements came at an Executive Briefing titled “Impact of Innovation on Bali’s Economic Development: A Showcase of U.S. Companies’ Initiatives”, held in Bali on Thursday, June 4, 2026. The event was organized by the US-ASEAN Business Council (USABC), which spotlighted the various initiatives of American companies contributing to Bali’s economic development amid global economic uncertainty.
